curation_notes: Patch modifies only petl/io/xml.py (1 file, +20-2). The fix adds a _create_xml_parser() helper that returns etree.XMLParser(resolve_entities=False) and passes it to etree.parse() in XmlView.__iter__. Previously, etree.parse(xmlf) was called without any parser argument, allowing default entity resolution when lxml was the XML backend. No sibling files in petl/io/ use etree.parse() in the same vulnerable pattern. Location derived from the patch diff — the vulnerable call site is in XmlView.__iter__. Vulnerability class xxe confirmed: CWE-611 maps directly to xxe and the fix explicitly disables entity resolution.
